---
title: "Work Experience"
---

```{=html}
<style>
.exp-container {
  max-width: 800px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.exp-entry {
  position: relative;
  padding-left: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 3rem;
  border-left: 2px solid #e5e7eb;
}

.exp-entry::before {
  content: '';
  position: absolute;
  left: -6px;
  top: 6px;
  width: 10px;
  height: 10px;
  border-radius: 50%;
  background: #1a6cf5;
  border: 2px solid #ffffff;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #1a6cf5;
}

.exp-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.4rem;
  margin-bottom: 0.3rem;
}

.exp-company {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #0f1117;
  font-family: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif;
}

.exp-dates {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #6b7280;
  font-weight: 500;
  background: #f3f4f6;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.6rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.exp-role {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #1a6cf5;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  letter-spacing: 0.02em;
}

.exp-bullets {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.6rem;
}

.exp-bullets li {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #374151;
  line-height: 1.65;
  padding-left: 1.2rem;
  position: relative;
}

.exp-bullets li::before {
  content: '→';
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  color: #1a6cf5;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  top: 0.15rem;
}

.exp-highlight {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #e8f0fe;
  color: #1a6cf5;
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  padding: 0.1rem 0.45rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.edu-section {
  margin-top: 3rem;
}

.edu-entry {
  background: #f9fafb;
  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.25rem 1.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: flex-start;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.5rem;
}

.edu-degree {
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: #0f1117;
}

.edu-school {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  color: #6b7280;
  margin-top: 0.15rem;
}

.edu-coursework {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #374151;
  margin-top: 0.5rem;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

.skills-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(220px, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
}

.skill-group {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e5e7eb;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1rem 1.2rem;
}

.skill-group-label {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.07em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #1a6cf5;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}

.skill-tags {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.3rem;
}

.skill-tag {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  background: #f3f4f6;
  color: #374151;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
}

h2 {
  font-family: 'DM Serif Display', Georgia, serif;
  font-size: 1.6rem;
  margin-top: 2.5rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.2rem;
  color: #0f1117;
}
</style>

<div class="exp-container">

<h2>Experience</h2>

<div class="exp-entry">
  <div class="exp-header">
    <div class="exp-company">Addepar, Inc.</div>
    <div class="exp-dates">Dec 2023 – May 2025</div>
  </div>
  <div class="exp-role">Data Engineer</div>
  <ul class="exp-bullets">
    <li>Led onboarding for <span class="exp-highlight">8+ enterprise clients</span> managing $500M+ AUM — traced data lineage through source systems and engineered trade, position, and cash data pipelines with full schema alignment, <strong>reducing onboarding cycle time by 25%</strong></li>
    <li>Standardized multi-custodian portfolio data by building Python-based transformation workflows in <span class="exp-highlight">Azure Databricks (Apache Spark)</span>, eliminating 90+ hours of monthly manual review and delivering canonical, analysis-ready datasets</li>
    <li>Conducted root cause analysis on cash breaks, pricing mismatches, and corporate action discrepancies — implemented data governance controls and automated monitoring to eliminate repeat failures</li>
    <li>Built Python validation scripts to flag and prioritize high-risk pricing and performance discrepancies by materiality, achieving <strong>98% accuracy</strong> and preventing <span class="exp-highlight">$2M+ in reporting errors</span> across live portfolios</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<div class="exp-entry">
  <div class="exp-header">
    <div class="exp-company">Fiserv, Inc.</div>
    <div class="exp-dates">Jul 2021 – Dec 2023</div>
  </div>
  <div class="exp-role">Data Engineer</div>
  <ul class="exp-bullets">
    <li>Delivered <span class="exp-highlight">5 enterprise data transformation programs</span> with zero data loss, migrating $2B+ in deposit and loan data via SSIS and SQL Server with end-to-end pipeline reliability across full platform conversions</li>
    <li>Developed <strong>90+ optimized T-SQL procedures</strong> to transform and analyze high-volume transactional and ledger data — identified processing bottlenecks and <strong>reduced batch time from 5 to 3 hours per cycle</strong></li>
    <li>Designed automated validation checks for GL balances, transaction completeness, and interest accruals — surfacing discrepancy patterns early and <span class="exp-highlight">accelerating testing cycles by 80%</span></li>
    <li>Identified systemic reconciliation gaps through SQL data profiling and established canonical source of truth for financial data, <strong>reducing manual reconciliation from 110+ to 15 hours per bank</strong></li>
    <li>Collaborated with banking stakeholders to translate regulatory, operational, and product requirements into ETL workflows and structured financial schemas for compliance during migrations</li>
  </ul>
</div>

<h2>Education</h2>

<div class="edu-section">
  <div class="edu-entry">
    <div>
      <div class="edu-degree">M.S. in Business Analytics</div>
      <div class="edu-school">University of California, San Diego · Expected Jun 2026</div>
      <div class="edu-coursework"><strong>Coursework:</strong> Customer Analytics (Uplift Modeling, Next-Product-to-Buy), Big Data Engineering (MapReduce, Apache Spark, HDFS), Statistical Modeling (A/B Testing, Monte Carlo Simulation)</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="edu-entry">
    <div>
      <div class="edu-degree">B.Tech. in Information Technology</div>
      <div class="edu-school">MKSSS's Cummins College of Engineering for Women, Pune · Jun 2021</div>
      <div class="edu-coursework">🏆 Represented <strong>India</strong> at the World Chess Championship during undergraduate studies</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<h2>Skills</h2>

<div class="skills-grid">
  <div class="skill-group">
    <div class="skill-group-label">Languages & Query</div>
    <div class="skill-tags">
      <span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">SQL</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">T-SQL</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">PostgreSQL</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-group">
    <div class="skill-group-label">Cloud & Data Platforms</div>
    <div class="skill-tags">
      <span class="skill-tag">Azure Databricks</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Snowflake</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">AWS S3</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Redshift</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-group">
    <div class="skill-group-label">ML & Analytics</div>
    <div class="skill-tags">
      <span class="skill-tag">Scikit-learn</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">XGBoost</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Prophet</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Hypothesis Testing</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-group">
    <div class="skill-group-label">BI & Visualization</div>
    <div class="skill-tags">
      <span class="skill-tag">Tableau</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Power BI</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Streamlit</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Excel</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-group">
    <div class="skill-group-label">Pipeline & ETL</div>
    <div class="skill-tags">
      <span class="skill-tag">SSIS</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">ETL/ELT</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Apache Spark</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">Git</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="skill-group">
    <div class="skill-group-label">AI & Automation</div>
    <div class="skill-tags">
      <span class="skill-tag">Prompt Engineering</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">LLM Dev</span>
      <span class="skill-tag">GitHub Copilot</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
```
